prompt: Realistic premium smartphone product photograph for an electronics catalog. A graphite triple-camera flagship-style phone, front and back devices arranged on a dark polished glass surface, no visible brand logo, no text, no watermark.

constraints: no logos, no readable text, no hands, no people, no packaging, no watermark
